creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
(In reply to henrix from comment #6)
> One last question, since you have the same laptop model: how long does it take for you to build CURRENT?  Or did you install it from a snapshot?

It is mostly depended on hardware. Since I'm build with WITH_CCACHE_BUILD=yes world+kernel is about one hour. When toolchain needs to be rebuilded it can take up to four hours.

> I guess that doing the initial full build will be a pain, as it'll require hint.hwpstate_intel.0.disabled=1 so that the system doesn't freeze, right?

Exactly.
